page: Microsoft Azure E128ns_v6 is an Env6 family virtual machine configured with 128 dedicated vCPUs based on the x86_64 Intel processor architecture. Running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, this server provides 1024.0 GB of system memory, yielding a memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per vCPU. It features no local storage and contains zero GPUs, relying entirely on external network-attached storage options.

As part of the Env6 network-optimized family, the E128ns_v6 is designed for high-throughput network workloads and is Premium Storage capable. This allows the instance to connect to high-performance external storage volumes to compensate for the lack of local disk resources. The dedicated CPU allocation ensures consistent processing capabilities without resource contention from neighboring virtual machines.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the high memory density of 8.0 GB per core positions this instance as a resource-dense option for memory-intensive enterprise workloads. The absence of bundled local storage and GPUs reduces overhead for deployments that do not require hardware acceleration or local scratch space. This configuration is suitable for large-scale relational databases, in-memory analytics, enterprise resource planning systems, and memory-heavy data processing pipelines.
description: Microsoft Azure E128ns_v6 is an Env6 family network-optimized virtual machine featuring 128 dedicated x86_64 Intel vCPUs and 1024.0 GB of RAM. Operating on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, this instance delivers a high memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per vCPU, classifying it as a memory-optimized resource. The server does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, but it is Premium Storage capable, allowing high-performance external storage integration. The dedicated CPU allocation ensures predictable performance for demanding enterprise workloads. This hardware profile is designed for memory-intensive applications, including large-scale databases, in-memory data analytics, and enterprise resource planning systems that require substantial memory capacity and network throughput without the need for local physical disks or graphics acceleration.
og_description: Microsoft Azure E128ns_v6 is an Env6 virtual machine with 128 dedicated Intel vCPUs, 1024 GB RAM, and Hyper-V virtualization, optimized for memory-intensive enterprise workloads.
